testSummary: Web unit: 173 passed, 4 skipped (campaigns: orthogonal-path 13, layout 15, mutate 35, + model/node-config/versioning all green). Full repo `pnpm test`: 43 tasks successful (integration tests skipped where DB-gated, standard local behavior).
e2eSummary: SOLO, one-at-a-time, ports freed between runs. campaign-builder: 16/16 pass (incl. new empty-diamond rectangle + after-branch merge insert + the Escape test green + existing axis-aligned/down-only/convergence). campaign-node-editors + campaign-publish-gate + campaign-versioning: 14/14 pass. broadcast-and-campaign: 12/12 pass. No regressions.
commandsRun: pnpm lint (7 known pre-existing react-hooks 'rule not found' errors only; none added)
notes: ISSUE 2 (+ on vertical): arms route down a dedicated vertical lane (laneX on LayoutEdge); verticalAnchor() returns a point guaranteed on a vertical run (lower-V midpoint for jogs, lane-middle-third for full lane routes). ISSUE 3 (empty diamond rectangle): empty arms to a directly-below join get distinct side lanes (onTrue left/onFalse right, source.x ± ARM_LANE=28) so the two arm (+)s sit at distinct x; merge (+) on the trunk. ISSUE 1 (insert after branch): insertAfterBranch() re-points every boundary edge feeding the single continuation C to a fresh N, N.next=C; merge node found via conditionMerge() = shallowest common descendant of all arms (NOT exclusiveSubtree.continuation, which breaks for the basic both-arms->C diamond because C is reachable only through the cond); omitted (throws) when no single C. campaign-merge-insert (+) rendered at C top-center on the trunk; condition/exit disabled in after-branch palette. ESCAPE root cause: placement Escape effect deps [placing,onCancelPlacement] left the capture keydown listener un-re-registered the 2nd time placement started after a prior cancel (diagnosed: placingReg stayed 1, escSeen=NONE on 2nd attempt). Fix: ONE lifetime-stable empty-deps capture listener reading latest placing+cancel from refs. VISUAL TUNING FLAG: empty-diamond merge (+) sits at the convergence point (C top) where the central trunk is short; lane width (ARM_LANE=28) + rail fractions (1/3, 2/3) are reasonable defaults but may want an eyeball pass for spacing/aesthetics.
